title: IRS Officer's Daughter Raped, Strangled To Death With Phone Charger In Delhi | Police Reveal Chilling Details
description: Chilling details have emerged in the murder of a senior IRS officer's 22-year-old-daughter, who was found dead at her home in southeast Delhi. The deceased was allegedly raped and strangled with a charging cable before being killed by a domestic helper who was recently fired from his job.
